metadata.description: Knowledge base for the Managed Services - PMO BD Hub chatbot. This file can be used as a reference for LLM-based chatbot integrations or as a standalone JSON KB.
metadata.howToUpdate: Add new entries to the 'entries' array. Each entry needs an 'id', 'topic', 'keywords' array, 'question', and 'answer'. Restart or reload the page after editing.

pmoGuidebook.name: PMO Guidebook
pmoGuidebook.description: Definitive guide to delivering PMO services — covers engagement setup, governance, RAID, reporting, QA, and close-out.

adminGuidebook.name: PMO Admin Guidebook
adminGuidebook.description: Operational handbook for Admin teams — meeting coordination, document management, onboarding, logistics, and offboarding.

vroGuidebook.name: VRO Guidebook
vroGuidebook.description: Strategic VRO methodology — benefits identification, mapping, tracking, business case support, KPIs, and value reporting.

phases.description: Rapid onboarding, stakeholder alignment, governance framework setup, and tooling configuration.
Disciplined delivery — status tracking, RAID management, reporting cycles, and stakeholder communications.
Retrospectives, lessons learned, process optimisation, and capability uplift.

entries.question: What is PMO as a Service?
entries.answer: PMO (Project Management Office as a Service) provides end-to-end project governance, planning, RAID management, stakeholder reporting, and delivery assurance for complex transformation programmes. Typical team: 3-15 FTEs, 6-24 month engagements, 30-40% cost savings.

entries.question: What is VRO as a Service?
entries.answer: VRO (Value Realisation Office as a Service) focuses on benefits tracking, value mapping, business case validation, and outcomes-based reporting. Typical team: 2-8 FTEs, 12-36 month engagements, 30-40% cost savings.

entries.question: What is PMO Admin as a Service?
entries.answer: PMO Admin (PMO Administration as a Service) provides operational support — meeting coordination, document management, onboarding, logistics, and time & expense tracking. Typical team: 1-5 FTEs, 40%+ cost savings.

entries.question: What's inside the PMO Guidebook?
entries.answer: The PMO Guidebook covers engagement setup, governance frameworks, RAID management, project planning, status reporting, resource & budget tracking, QA protocols, stakeholder management, and transition/close-out procedures.

entries.question: What's inside the Admin Guidebook?
entries.answer: The Admin Guidebook covers meeting coordination, document management, onboarding/offboarding, engagement logistics, time & expense tracking, communication support, and data entry procedures.

entries.question: What's inside the VRO Guidebook?
entries.answer: The VRO Guidebook covers VRO fundamentals, benefits identification & mapping, business case support, KPI definition, value tracking & measurement, benefits reporting, stakeholder value narratives, and post-implementation reviews.

entries.question: Where can I find RAID-related templates?
entries.answer: RAID templates include: RAID Log Template (consolidated tracker), Risk Register (with probability/impact scoring), Issue Log (with resolution tracking), Assumption Log, and Dependency Register. All available in the Templates Library.

entries.question: What status report templates are available?
entries.answer: Status reporting templates include: Weekly Status Report, Monthly Status Report, SteerCo Pack Template, Programme Dashboard Template, and Workstream Status Summary. All in PowerPoint/Excel format.

entries.question: Who are the PH MS contacts?
entries.answer: General inquiries: . Service leads: PMO Service Lead, VRO Service Lead, PMO Admin Service Lead, PH MS Leadership Team. Check internal directory for specific names.

entries.question: What is the Enable-Execute-Evolve approach?
entries.answer: Our three-phase model: (1) Enable — rapid onboarding, governance setup, tooling; (2) Execute — disciplined delivery, reporting, RAID management; (3) Evolve — retrospectives, process optimisation, capability uplift.

entries.question: What cost savings does Managed Services deliver?
entries.answer: 30-40% cost savings compared to onshore delivery for PMO and VRO, and 40%+ for Admin services. Value drivers include scalable resourcing, standardised delivery, 100+ ready templates, and proven governance frameworks.

entries.question: What BD tools are available?
entries.answer: The BD Tools page includes elevator pitch examples, capability statements, BD FAQ, positioning guides for PMO/VRO, and links to key collateral for client conversations.

entries.question: How do I get started as a new team member?
entries.answer: Start with: (1) Read your role's Guidebook, (2) Browse available Templates, (3) Review the Service Catalogue, (4) Check BD Tools for positioning. Your engagement manager will provide assignment details.

entries.question: What project planning templates are available?
entries.answer: Planning templates include: Project Plan Template, Project Schedule, Milestone Tracker, Workstream Plan Template, Sprint Planning Template, and Resource Plan Template.

entries.question: What governance templates are available?
entries.answer: Governance templates include: Governance Framework Template, SteerCo Pack Template, Tollgate Checklist, RACI Matrix Template, Decision Log Template, and Escalation Log Template.

entries.question: What benefits-related templates are available?
entries.answer: Benefits templates include: Benefits Register, Benefits Map, Benefits Realisation Plan, Benefits Baseline Assessment, Benefits Variance Analysis, Benefits Categorisation Framework, and Benefits Sustainability Checklist.

entries.question: What business case templates are available?
entries.answer: Business case templates include: Business Case Template, ROI Calculator, Cost-Benefit Analysis Template, Investment Case Summary, and Scenario Planning Template.

entries.question: How many templates do we have?
entries.answer: We have 110+ templates across 4 categories: PMO (~45 templates), VRO (~24 templates), PPE (~15 templates), and Admin (~20 templates). All are available in the searchable Templates Library.

entries.question: What is the FY26 Service Catalogue?
entries.answer: The FY26 Service Catalogue outlines three core offerings: PMO as a Service, VRO as a Service, and PMO Admin as a Service. It includes engagement lifecycle details, case studies, service snapshots, and a comparison table.

entries.question: What meeting-related templates are available?
entries.answer: Meeting templates include: Meeting Agenda Template, Meeting Minutes Template, Meeting Minutes Template (Admin), Daily Stand-up Log, and Room Booking Tracker.
